title: Is there a way to save a Gantt view to include groups collapsed?
excerpt:
Would like the ability to save a set view of my Gantt charts so that Groups are Collapsed/Expanded. 
Would also love to be able to save the view to Months vs. Quarters vs. Weeks etc. so that anyone who views the dashboar…

posts.author: Akauffmann (Allison)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would like the ability to save a set view of my Gantt charts so that Groups are Collapsed/Expanded.

Would also love to be able to save the view to Months vs. Quarters vs. Weeks etc. so that anyone who views the dashboard also sees it in that view, instead of it auto-defaulting to a view.
